content.text:
[cron:agent-network-health-hourly agent-network-health-check] Phase 1: run python3 ~/.openclaw/openclaw-prod/scripts/network_health.py. Return blank when the script output is healthy or only reports OK:. Return a concise alert summary only when the output contains ALERT: or observability_degraded, including the affected pod or agent and the reason. Do not add analysis.
